name: JiimSmith health deploy marker and model catalog
description: Verify that the JiimSmith backend project exposes the deployed health marker and exactly one default LLM provider.

planSteps.description: Verify the response is 200 with JSON where status equals ok and commit is a non-empty string.
Verify the response is 200 and providers is a non-empty list.
Verify every provider has provider_id, display_name, model_name, configured, and is_default fields.
Verify exactly one provider has is_default set to true.
